  as={"h1"}

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/authorize/google"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Google OAuth Authorization

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"code":{"description":"Authorization code received from Google frontend.","type":"string"}},"required":["code"],"type":"object"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Successfully authenticated via Google."},"403":{"description":"Account is inactive."},"500":{"description":"Google setup error."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
